asset_type: contact sheet for academic paper framework SVG icon refinement
prompt:
Create a clean contact sheet of 25 minimalist academic vector-style icons on a white background. Use one icon per grid cell with generous whitespace around every icon, no text, no labels, no watermark. Style: consistent thin dark outline, subtle pale blue fills, rounded corners, publication-quality PPT-friendly symbols, readable at small size. Optimize each icon by its meaning, not by copying any source-paper figure. Icons in order:
1. modular pipeline (method pipeline, module chain, stage flow)
2. branch and merge flow (fork merge, parallel branches)
3. feedback loop (loop, iterative refinement, closed loop)
4. central orchestrator (hub orchestration, controller, router)
5. train/inference split (train infer split, training inference lanes)
6. swimlane workflow (swimlane, phase lanes)
7. hierarchical stack (hierarchy, tree stack)
8. zoom callout (zoom callout, detail inset)
9. dual tower architecture (two tower, dual encoder, Siamese)
10. encoder-decoder architecture (encoder decoder, autoencoder)
11. transformer block (transformer block, attention block)
12. attention wiring (attention wiring, QKV attention)
13. KV cache memory (KV cache, context cache)
14. mixture-of-experts router (MoE router, expert routing)
15. adapter/PEFT block (adapter, LoRA, PEFT)
16. selective scan block (Mamba, SSM, selective scan)
17. diffusion denoise chain (diffusion, denoise chain)
18. server-client round (federated round, client server)
19. RAG retrieval flow (RAG, retrieval augmented generation)
20. agent loop (agent loop, planner tool memory)
21. multi-agent collaboration (multi-agent, agent collaboration)
22. human-AI feedback loop (human feedback, human in the loop)
23. VLM multimodal fusion (VLM fusion, vision language fusion)
24. VLA robot action path (VLA, robot action, policy action)
25. graph network (graph network, node-edge graph)
negative_prompt: No source-paper labels, no equations, no metrics, no datasets, no dense UI screenshots, no raster texture, no 3D render shadows, no tiny unreadable details.
intended_postprocess: cut each grid cell, inspect semantics, then programmatically redraw as editable SVG primitives
